settings.heading: B2B purchasing guidelines
settings.intro: GlobiSun supports quote-based wholesale purchasing and sourcing requests starting at $500 USD before shipping and taxes.
settings.body:
$500 wholesale minimum

GlobiSun currently supports wholesale and sourcing orders starting at $500 USD before shipping and taxes. This minimum helps keep overseas freight, carton weight, packaging, supplier coordination, and bulk handling costs efficient for B2B buyers.

Why the minimum exists

Many art supply orders are sourced, packed, or reviewed by carton weight, case pack, supplier availability, and shipping feasibility. A $500 starting point keeps the order volume practical enough to review freight, lead time, and product substitutions professionally.

Smaller sample requests

Smaller sample or planning requests may be reviewed case by case, but they are not guaranteed. If your request is below $500, please submit a quote inquiry instead of checking out directly.

Pricing

Bulk pricing is reviewed by quantity, product type, availability, delivery destination, and requested timeline. Some products may be available only by quote.

Lead time

Lead time depends on product availability, quantity, supplier processing, shipping method, and delivery requirements. Please include your target date when submitting an inquiry.

Order review

Submitting an inquiry does not guarantee availability or final pricing. We review each request and respond with suitable next steps when the request is a fit.

Quote validity

Wholesale quote details may change if supplier availability, quantity, shipping destination, or requested timeline changes before order confirmation.

Product substitutions

When a specific product is unavailable, GlobiSun may suggest similar alternatives based on intended use, budget, and timing.
settings.cta_heading: Send us your product list or sourcing request.
settings.cta_text: We can review product category, quantity, lead time, and suitable B2B options.

settings.title: MOQ guidance
settings.text: Wholesale orders start at $500 before shipping and taxes. Smaller sample requests are reviewed case by case.

settings.title: Quote-based pricing
settings.text: Pricing is reviewed based on product, quantity, destination, and timing.

settings.title: B2B communication
settings.text: Clear details help us respond faster and more accurately.

settings.heading: $500 minimum order target before shipping and taxes.
settings.intro: This policy supports efficient B2B sourcing, overseas freight planning, packing, supplier coordination, and bulk handling.
settings.minimum_text: Applies to standard wholesale order review before shipping, taxes, and final quote confirmation.
settings.note: Below the minimum? Submit a quote request for sample or planning review instead of checking out directly.
